data.title: Sen. Tim Scott promises “painful repercussions” for Democrats who stalled crypto’s GENIUS Act
data.description:
Senator Tim Scott said on Thursday night that Democrats who voted against the GENIUS Act should expect “painful” political consequences. He made the statement after the crypto bill failed in the US Senate, where Democrats blocked it despite months of bipartisan talks. The GENIUS Act, led by Senator Bill Hagerty, would have created the first […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/scott-painful-repercussions-dems-crypto-bill/

data.title: Bitcoin won’t see ‘gigantic’ SWF buying until laws greenlit — Scaramucci
data.description:
Sovereign Wealth Funds are already gaining exposure to Bitcoin, but significant allocations won’t happen until the United States establishes clearer regulations for the digital assets industry, says SkyBridge founder Anthony Scaramucci. “I think they are buying it, I think they are buying it on the margin,” Scaramucci, former White House director of communications during US President Donald Trump’s first term, said on Anthony Pompliano’s podcast on May 8. Legislation will lead to “large blocks of buying”“I don’t think it is going to be a gigantic groundswell of buying until we greenlight legislation in the United States,” he added. Scaramucci previously said in a February interview with the Financial Times that he expects the US government to propose crypto legislation in November
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-buying-sovereign-wealth-funds-united-states-legislation-anthony-scaramucci?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: A whale address withdrew 1,139 BTC from Binance in the past hour
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain lens monitoring, a whale address starting with bc1q57 has withdrawn a total of 1,139 BTC (worth approximately $117.43 million) from Binance in the past hour. 
Currently, the giant whale address holds 2,616 BTC (worth approximately $269.5 million).

data.title: A whale address that built a PEPE position a week ago sold 1 trillion PEPE and made a profit of more than $3.5 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, as PEPE rose, the "Smart Money address that bought low and sold high WBTC and made a profit of $14.26 million" that ambushed PEPE a week ago made another profit of $3.53 million. In the past 14 hours, 1 trillion PEPE (worth about $12.48 million) was suspected to have been sold, and the remaining 1 trillion PEPE still has a floating profit of $3.52 million, with an average opening price of $0.00000895.

data.title: Trader Eugene: Bitcoin may hit a new all-time high, and altcoins are expected to rebound strongly
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio posted on his personal channel that although he correctly judged the direction of the rise this time, he was stopped out of losses in advance due to shocks, and the actual returns were not good.
Looking ahead to the future market, this rise to $100,000 confirmed the previous support reversal of $90,000. Now the market is likely to hit a new record high again. This was not originally expected, but funds from micro-strategies and ETFs seem to be flowing in. In contrast, until yesterday, most old players in the currency circle were still watching (or even shorting). As the expectation of a new record high rekindles the market's enthusiasm, it is expected that the total market value of altcoins will rebound strongly.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Anticipates Strong Rebound Amid New Highs
data.description: According to Odaily, trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio shared insights on his personal channel, noting that despite correctly predicting the recent market uptrend, his actual gains were limited due to being stopped out by volatility. Looking ahead, the recent surge to $100,000 has confirmed the previous support reversal at $90,000, suggesting the market may once again challenge historical highs. This scenario was initially unexpected, but continuous inflows from MicroStrategy and ETFs appear to be driving the momentum. In contrast, until yesterday, most seasoned cryptocurrency players were still observing or even shorting the market. With the anticipation of new historical highs reigniting market enthusiasm, a robust rebound in the total market capitalization of altcoins is expected.
